name: Flame-Toasted Whole-Wheat Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a tortilla directly over a medium-high gas flame, or set it on a cookie rack over an electric burner.
2. Toast the tortilla until the surface is lightly charred with flecks and begins to fill with steam, about 10 to 20 seconds.
3. Turn the tortilla over and toast the other side.
4. For best results, brush the tortilla with oil or butter before toasting.
5. Place the toasted tortillas in a towel-lined basket while you finish toasting the remaining pieces.
6. Serve the tortillas hot.
Serves 6
